'''âl-v-j''' ('''lavaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:egest|egest]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:egest|egest]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-v-j
|-
! Lemma
| lavaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lavajithi|lavajithi]] || [[word:lavajiji|lavajiji]] || [[word:lavajishi|lavajishi]] || [[word:lavaji|lavaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lavajuthuth|lavajuthuth]] || [[word:lavajujuj|lavajujuj]] || [[word:lavajushush|lavajushush]] || [[word:lavaj|lavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lavajuthu|lavajuthu]] || [[word:lavajuju|lavajuju]] || [[word:lavajushu|lavajushu]] || [[word:lavaju|lavaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lavajufuth|lavajufuth]] || [[word:lavajufuj|lavajufuj]] || [[word:lavajufush|lavajufush]] || [[word:lavajuf|lavajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lavajethe|lavajethe]] || [[word:lavajeje|lavajeje]] || [[word:lavajeshe|lavajeshe]] || [[word:lavaje|lavaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lavajothoth|lavajothoth]] || [[word:lavajojoj|lavajojoj]] || [[word:lavajoshosh|lavajoshosh]] || [[word:lavaj|lavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lavajotho|lavajotho]] || [[word:lavajojo|lavajojo]] || [[word:lavajosho|lavajosho]] || [[word:lavajo|lavajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lavajofoth|lavajofoth]] || [[word:lavajofoj|lavajofoj]] || [[word:lavajofosh|lavajofosh]] || [[word:lavajof|lavajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lavajĂŠthĂŠ|lavajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lavajĂŠjĂŠ|lavajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lavajĂŠshĂŠ|lavajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lavajĂŠ|lavajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lavajathath|lavajathath]] || [[word:lavajajaj|lavajajaj]] || [[word:lavajashash|lavajashash]] || [[word:lavaj|lavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lavajatha|lavajatha]] || [[word:lavajaja|lavajaja]] || [[word:lavajasha|lavajasha]] || [[word:lavaja|lavaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lavajafath|lavajafath]] || [[word:lavajafaj|lavajafaj]] || [[word:lavajafash|lavajafash]] || [[word:lavajaf|lavajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lavajasha|lavajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golavajasha|golavajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilavajasha|gokilavajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lavajnĂŒsha|lavajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golavajnknĂŒsha|golavajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilavajnĂŒsha|gokilavajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lavajshĂ«sha|lavajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golavajnkshĂ«sha|golavajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilavajshĂ«sha|gokilavajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lavajrosha|lavajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golavajnkrosha|golavajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilavajrosha|gokilavajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lavajmusha|lavajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golavajnkmusha|golavajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilavajmusha|gokilavajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lavajsherasha|lavajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golavajnksherasha|golavajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilavajsherasha|gokilavajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lavajngasha|lavajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golavajnkngasha|golavajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilavajngasha|gokilavajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lavajyasha|lavajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golavajnkyasha|golavajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilavajyasha|gokilavajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lavajyamasha|lavajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golavajnkyamasha|golavajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilavajyamasha|gokilavajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lavajnĂŒshĂ«sha|lavajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golavajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|golavajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilavajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokilavajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lavajnĂŒrosha|lavajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golavajnknĂŒrosha|golavajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilavajnĂŒrosha|gokilavajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lavajnĂŒmusha|lavajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golavajnknĂŒmusha|golavajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilavajnĂŒmusha|gokilavajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lavajshĂ«nĂŒsha|lavajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golavajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|golavajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilavajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokilavajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lavajshĂ«rosha|lavajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golavajnkshĂ«rosha|golavajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilavajshĂ«rosha|gokilavajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lavajshĂ«musha|lavajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golavajnkshĂ«musha|golavajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilavajshĂ«musha|gokilavajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lavajronĂŒsha|lavajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golavajnkronĂŒsha|golavajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilavajronĂŒsha|gokilavajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lavajroshĂ«sha|lavajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golavajnkroshĂ«sha|golavajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilavajroshĂ«sha|gokilavajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lavajromusha|lavajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golavajnkromusha|golavajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilavajromusha|gokilavajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lavajmunĂŒsha|lavajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golavajnkmunĂŒsha|golavajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilavajmunĂŒsha|gokilavajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lavajmushĂ«sha|lavajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golavajnkmushĂ«sha|golavajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilavajmushĂ«sha|gokilavajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lavajmurosha|lavajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golavajnkmurosha|golavajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilavajmurosha|gokilavajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lavaj|lavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lĂŠvĂŠj|lĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holavaj|holavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holĂŠvĂŠj|holĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholavaj|hoholavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholĂŠvĂŠj|hoholĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒlavaj|nĂŒlavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒlĂŠvĂŠj|nĂŒlĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlavaj|nĂŒnĂŒlavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠvĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻlavaj|nĂŻlavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻlĂŠvĂŠj|nĂŻlĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlavaj|nĂŻnĂŻlavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠvĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulavaj|lulavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulĂŠvĂŠj|lulĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululavaj|lululavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululĂŠvĂŠj|lululĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilavaj|lilavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilĂŠvĂŠj|lilĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililavaj|lililavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililĂŠvĂŠj|lililĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolavaj|kolavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolĂŠvĂŠj|kolĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolavaj|kokolavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolĂŠvĂŠj|kokolĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelavaj|kelavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelĂŠvĂŠj|kelĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelavaj|kekelavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelĂŠvĂŠj|kekelĂŠvĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
